hero.description: High-quality seeds for paddy, wheat, maize, mustard, and vegetables, along with premium fertilizers and top-grade pesticides are available at reasonable prices.
hero.farmerCardText: "With certified seeds from Nishad Beej Bhandar, farmers achieve better germination and record yields every year."

features.f1_desc: High germination rate improved & certified seeds
features.f2_desc: Products certified & registered by the Agricultural Dept
features.f4_desc: Scientific advice by Abhay Nishad (B.Sc Ag)
features.f6_desc: Adequate stock of seasonal seeds and medicines

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: All kinds of certified seeds, organic & chemical fertilizers, and branded pesticides for crop safety

about.label: About the Owner
about.name: Abhay Nishad, B.Sc Agriculture
about.desc1: Greetings, farmer brothers! I am Abhay Nishad, a B.Sc. Agriculture graduate. My goal is not just to sell agricultural products to Indian farmers, but also to provide them with scientific and correct guidance.
about.desc2: At Nishad Beej Bhandar, you are provided with seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides from genuine branded companies (such as Bayer, Syngenta, Pioneer, IFFCO) at reasonable prices. We provide farmers with scientific advice for pest prevention and maximum yield at every stage from sowing to harvesting.

benefits.label: Farmer Benefits
benefits.title: Benefits of Joining Us
benefits.b1_desc: Use of certified hybrid seeds increases crop production capacity by 15-20%.
benefits.b2_desc: All seeds are packed and certified as per government standards.
benefits.b3_desc: All seeds available in the store have the best germination percentage.
benefits.b4_desc: Original fungicide and insecticide medicines protect crops from serious diseases and pests.
benefits.b5_desc: Soil testing, seed treatment, and correct diagnosis of diseases by Abhay Nishad (B.Sc Ag).
benefits.b6_desc: Information about new agricultural implements, micronutrients, and organic farming techniques.

cropGuide.label: Seasonal Advisory
cropGuide.title: Seasonal Advanced Farming Guide
cropGuide.subtitle: Choose the right crop according to the season, get information about fertilizer schedules and pest control
cropGuide.actionLink: Inquire for availability of fertilizers and seeds for these crops
cropGuide.kharif_seeds: Recommended Seeds: Paddy (Arize 6444, Pioneer 27P31), Maize (Pioneer 3396, Shriram 9258), Millet
cropGuide.kharif_fertilizer: Fertilizer Schedule: NPK (12:32:16) or DAP + Zinc at the time of sowing. First spray of Urea after 21-25 days.
cropGuide.kharif_tips: Prevention: Spray Coragen or Cartap Hydrochloride timely for stem borer in paddy.
cropGuide.rabi_seeds: Recommended Seeds: Wheat (Shriram Super 252, HD-3086), Mustard (Pioneer 45S46, RH-749), Gram, Pea
cropGuide.rabi_fertilizer: Fertilizer Schedule: DAP or NPK + Sulphur at the time of sowing wheat. Urea spray on first irrigation (21 days).
cropGuide.rabi_tips: Prevention: Use Imidacloprid to protect mustard from aphids.
cropGuide.zaid_seeds: Recommended Seeds: Moong (IPM-02-3), Urad, Cucumber (Seminis Malini), Tomato (Abhilash), Watermelon
cropGuide.zaid_fertilizer: Fertilizer Schedule: Use organic manure along with micronutrients and NPK 19:19:19.
cropGuide.zaid_tips: Prevention: Use neem oil or mild pesticides to protect vegetables from fruit borers and sucking pests.

reviews.label: Farmer Testimonials
reviews.title: Farmers' Trust in Us
reviews.r1_comment: Paddy seed (Arize 6444) bought from Nishad Beej Bhandar was spectacular this year. The yield was 5 quintals per acre more than last year. Abhay ji's advice was very helpful.
reviews.r2_comment: Pesticides and fertilizers are absolutely genuine here. Prices are also lower than other shops in the market, and Abhay bhaiya (B.Sc Ag) prescribes the right medicine for every disease.
reviews.r3_comment: I bought tomato seeds (Abhilash). The germination was excellent. Thanks to Abhay ji for advice from sowing to harvesting.
